word: H658 - אֶפֶס דַּמִּים - ʼEpheç Dammîym - eh'-fes dam-meem' - Ephes-dammim

sections.paragraph:
Original: אפס דּמּים

Transliteration: 'ephes dammı̂ym

Phonetic: eh'-fes dam-meem'

BDB Definition:

Ephes Dammim = "edge of blood"
  1. a place approx 16 miles (25 kilometers) southwest of Jerusalem

Origin: from H657 and the plural of H1818

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
